mapper.insert: insert into user_role (id, user_id, role_id, creation_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_role
id,
user_id,
role_id,
creation_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{creationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_role
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
creation_time = #{creationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select role_name from role_info r LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select ri.id, ri.role_name roleName,ri.role_code roleCode, ri.is_enable isEnable, ri.create_time createTime from role_info ri left join user_role ur on ri.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_role (id, user_id, role_id, creation_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update creation_time = values(creation_time)

insert into user_role (id, user_id, role_id, creation_time) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from user_role where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and role_id !=1
